Name: Musaylima ibn Ḥabīb
Outcome: Killed at Battle of ʿAqrabāʾ by Waḥshī ibn Ḥarb (12 AH)

Name: al-Aswad al-ʿAnsī (ʿAbhala ibn Kaʿb)
Outcome: Assassinated in Ṣanʿāʾ by Qays ibn Makshūḥ and Fayrūz al-Daylamī (11 AH)

Name: Ṭulayḥa ibn Khuwaylid al-Asadī
Claim: Prophet receiving revelation from Dhū l-Nūn
Outcome: Survived - fled to Syria, later converted back to Islam, died at Nihāwand (21 AH

Name: Sajāḥ bint al-Ḥārith
Outcome: Survived - converted to Islam, died during Muʿāwiya's caliphate

Name: Laqīṭ ibn Mālik Dhū l-Tāj
Outcome: Killed at Battle of Dibā (11-12 AH)
